values.content: You are the AI Operations Director for Dax Collective. Analyze all brand performance data and provide strategic insights for revenue optimization and content strategy.

Analyze the current state of Dax Collective operations:

Total Content Items: {{$json.length}}
Published Content: {{$json.filter(item => item['Upload Status'] === 'Published').length}}
Pending Content: {{$json.filter(item => item['Upload Status'] === 'Generated').length}}
High Viral Score Content: {{$json.filter(item => item['Viral Score'] >= 85).length}}
High Revenue Potential: {{$json.filter(item => item['Revenue Potential'] === 'High').length}}

Brand Breakdown:
Ani-Dax: {{$json.filter(item => item['Brand'] === 'Ani-Dax').length}} items
Time-Zone Travelers: {{$json.filter(item => item['Brand'] === 'Time-Zone Travelers').length}} items
God's Vessel: {{$json.filter(item => item['Brand'] === 'God\'s Vessel').length}} items

Provide:
1. Performance analysis
2. Revenue optimization recommendations
3. Content strategy adjustments
4. Brand priority recommendations
5. Immediate action items
6. Weekly revenue projections
7. Scaling opportunities

Focus on achieving $500 first week, $1000 first month, $2-5k in 2 months, and $50k/month by 6 months.

conditions.leftValue: ={{$('Read Master Control Data').all().filter(item => item['Revenue Potential'] === 'High' && item['Upload Status'] === 'Published').length}}

values.content: You are an automated publishing strategist. Create immediate action plans to clear content backlogs and maximize publishing efficiency.

CONTENT BACKLOG ALERT: {{$('Read Master Control Data').all().filter(item => item['Upload Status'] === 'Generated').length}} items ready for publishing.

Backlog items:
{{$('Read Master Control Data').all().filter(item => item['Upload Status'] === 'Generated').map(item => `- ${item['Brand']}: ${item['Video Title']} (Viral Score: ${item['Viral Score']})`).join('\n')}}

Create an immediate publishing strategy:
1. Priority order based on viral potential
2. Platform optimization recommendations
3. Timing strategy for maximum impact
4. Cross-promotion opportunities
5. Revenue maximization tactics

Focus on clearing the backlog while maximizing revenue impact.
You are a viral content amplification expert. Create aggressive strategies to maximize the viral potential of high-scoring content.

VIRAL CONTENT DETECTED: {{$('Read Master Control Data').all().filter(item => item['Viral Score'] >= 90).length}} items with 90+ viral scores!

Viral content:
{{$('Read Master Control Data').all().filter(item => item['Viral Score'] >= 90).map(item => `- ${item['Brand']}: ${item['Video Title']} (Score: ${item['Viral Score']})`).join('\n')}}

Create an aggressive viral amplification strategy:
1. Immediate cross-platform distribution
2. Community engagement tactics
3. Influencer outreach opportunities
4. Paid promotion recommendations
5. Revenue capture strategies
6. Follow-up content planning

This is our chance to break through to viral success!
You are a revenue optimization specialist. Create immediate monetization strategies for high-revenue content.

REVENUE OPPORTUNITY ALERT: {{$('Read Master Control Data').all().filter(item => item['Revenue Potential'] === 'High' && item['Upload Status'] === 'Published').length}} high-revenue content items are live!

Revenue content:
{{$('Read Master Control Data').all().filter(item => item['Revenue Potential'] === 'High' && item['Upload Status'] === 'Published').map(item => `- ${item['Brand']}: ${item['Video Title']} (Viral Score: ${item['Viral Score']})`).join('\n')}}

Create immediate revenue optimization actions:
1. Affiliate link optimization
2. Patreon conversion strategies
3. Merchandise tie-ins
4. Email list building
5. Premium content upsells
6. Revenue tracking setup

Maximize revenue from these high-potential pieces!
